calendar.matters:
Petition For Final Distribution; First And Final Report Of Executor On Waiver Of Account; And Petition For Allowance Of Costs And Compensation To Attorneys For Ordinary Services And For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of The Estate
Off Calendar Sep-21-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-21-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 26, 2000 is admitted to probate. Susan Mizner is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 21, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed before that date, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2021 Continued To Mar-22-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
